title: AI in Production: Agentic Engineering Across the SDLC
abstract: I map my AI-in-production workflow to the software development lifecycle, from discovery to operations, with clear handoffs between AI agents and human owners. The core idea: agentic engineering is not a coding trick but a delivery system for reliable software.
meta-title: AI in Production: Agentic Engineering Mapped to the SDLC
meta-description: A practical AI-in-production framework: map agentic engineering to each SDLC phase with clear ownership, quality gates, and repeatable delivery.
headerImageCaption: Editorial-style header illustration for this article (AI-generated).
